---
title: "Jungmin Woo - Group 3 Individual Participation Report"
author: "Jungmin Woo"
date: today
format: html
---
  
  # Individual Participation Report
  
  ## Group Information
  
  -   **Group:** 3
-   **Project:** Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing
-   **Group Members:** Yushan, Sora, Grace, Sandy, Jungmin

## My Contributions

At this stage of the project, my contributions have mainly focused on planning and team coordination. My responsibilities include:
  
- Contributed ideas during team discussions and planning sessions.
- Supported the process of selecting an appropriate dataset for the project.
- Reminded and encouraged team members to finalize and choose the dataset on time.
- Assisted with organizing the project structure and planning the presentation.

## Reflection
